Bash(python3 -c "
import zipfile
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

docx_path = r'C:/Users/Administrator/Downloads/Career stategy pafe.docx'

with zipfile.ZipFile\(docx_path, 'r'\) as z:
    with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f:
        tree = ET.parse\(f\)
        root = tree.getroot\(\)

ns = {'w': 'http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main'}

paragraphs = []
for para in root.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}p'\):
    texts = []
    for t in para.iter\('{http://schemas.openxmlformats.org/wordprocessingml/2006/main}t'\):
        if t.text:
            texts.append\(t.text\)
    if texts:
        paragraphs.append\(''.join\(texts\)\)

print\('\\n'.join\(paragraphs\)\)
")

Bash(py -c "
import zipfile
import xml.etree.ElementTree as ET

docx_path = r'C:/Users/Administrator/Downloads/Doc7.docx'

with zipfile.ZipFile\(docx_path, 'r'\) as z:
    names = z.namelist\(\)
    print\('Files in docx:'\)
    for n in names:
        print\(' ', n\)
    with z.open\('word/document.xml'\) as f:
        raw = f.read\(\)
    print\(\)
    print\('document.xml size:', len\(raw\), 'bytes'\)
    print\(\)
    print\('First 3000 chars:'\)
    print\(raw[:3000].decode\('utf-8', errors='replace'\)\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(py -c "
import zipfile
import shutil

docx_path = r'C:/Users/Administrator/Downloads/Doc7.docx'
out_path = r'C:/Users/Administrator/Downloads/Doc7_image1.png'

with zipfile.ZipFile\(docx_path, 'r'\) as z:
    with z.open\('word/media/image1.png'\) as src, open\(out_path, 'wb'\) as dst:
        shutil.copyfileobj\(src, dst\)
    print\('Extracted image to:', out_path\)
" 2>&1)
